eventPreCondition: Play on the table if Aragorn is with a Free Peoples Army in a region outside of a Free Peoples Nation.
eventText: While this card is in play, Action dice used to move the Fellowship are not added to the Hunt Box.
eventDiscardCondition: You must discard this card from the table as soon as the Fellowship is declared or revealed.
combatText: The Shadow player rolls a maximum of three dice in his Combat roll.
